ogTitle: Juna Downs vs Kadathinni: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Juna Downs and Kadathinni.
heading: Juna Downs vs Kadathinni — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Juna Downs, Western Australia and Kadathinni, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Juna Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kadathinni (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Juna Downs or Kadathinni safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Juna Downs has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Kadathinni scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Juna Downs scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Kadathinni scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Juna Downs or Kadathinni?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Juna Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
